title: Venezuelan Quesadilla
description: A crispy and gooey Venezuelan-inspired quesadilla filled with melted cheese. Perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Place the quesadilla in the skillet and sprinkle with venezuelan cheese.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the quesadilla is crispy.
Flip the quesadilla over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is crispy.
Cut the quesadilla into wedges and serve hot.
Optional: top with additional venezuelan cheese and gooey cheese.
